'''hawaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilcoat|oilcoat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilcoat|oilcoat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hawaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæwæbæth|hæwæbæth]] || [[word:hæwæbæj|hæwæbæj]] || [[word:hæwæbæsh|hæwæbæsh]] || [[word:hæwæbæ|hæwæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawawabath|hawawabath]] || [[word:hawawabaj|hawawabaj]] || [[word:hawawabash|hawawabash]] || [[word:hawawaba|hawawaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawabath|hawabath]] || [[word:hawabaj|hawabaj]] || [[word:hawabash|hawabash]] || [[word:hawaba|hawaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawafbath|hawafbath]] || [[word:hawafbaj|hawafbaj]] || [[word:hawafbash|hawafbash]] || [[word:hawafbaf|hawafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hawabatha|hawabatha]] || [[word:hawabaja|hawabaja]] || [[word:hawabasha|hawabasha]] || [[word:hawabaka|hawabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hawabath|hawabath]] || [[word:hawabaj|hawabaj]] || [[word:hawabash|hawabash]] || [[word:hawaba|hawaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hawabathal|hawabathal]] || [[word:hawabajal|hawabajal]] || [[word:hawabashal|hawabashal]] || [[word:hawabakal|hawabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hawabathatha|hawabathatha]] || [[word:hawabajaja|hawabajaja]] || [[word:hawabashasha|hawabashasha]] || [[word:hawabaka|hawabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hawabathan|hawabathan]] || [[word:hawabajan|hawabajan]] || [[word:hawabashan|hawabashan]] || [[word:hawabakan|hawabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hawabathaoro|hawabathaoro]] || [[word:hawabajaoro|hawabajaoro]] || [[word:hawabashaoro|hawabashaoro]] || [[word:hawabakaoro|hawabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
